name: Maneuvering Attack
entries: When you hit a creature with an attack roll, you can expend one Superiority Die to maneuver one of your comrades into another position. Add the Superiority Die roll to the attack's damage roll, and choose a willing creature who can see or hear you. That creature can use its {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to move up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} without provoking an {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB} from the target of your attack.
